Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.MarketplacesHepsiburadaComingSoon: Hepsiburada integration screens will be added here.
Texts.Permission:Cimri.Probe: Probe a single Cimri product page
Texts.CimriPullIntro: Enter any Cimri listing URL below (discounted feed or a category page). Selenium opens it and loads more if available; cards with a parsed discount percentage are processed highest-first. Offer expansion uses '+X Fiyat Teklifini Gör'. The product grid also sorts by highest discount first.
Texts.CimriIncludeOffersLabel: Open detail pages and parse merchant offers
Texts.CimriExpandAllOffersLabel: Click '+X Fiyat Teklifini Gör' to load all offers
Texts.CimriEmptyList: Nothing saved yet — press Pull & save. Requires BeeBAK.Cimri.Sync.
Texts.CimriLoadErrorTitle: Could not load products from the server
Texts.CimriListNetworkHint: The browser could not reach the API (status 0). With ng serve, ensure proxy.conf.json forwards /api to Http.Api.Host, restart ng serve after changing proxy.
Texts.CimriDevApiWrongHostHint: The response came from the Angular dev server, not BeeBAK.Http.Api.Host. Use proxy.conf.json, restart ng serve, run the API at https://localhost:44381.
Texts.CimriInvalidProductUrl: The product URL is missing or invalid.
Texts.CimriProductUrlMustBeHttps: Only HTTPS Cimri product URLs are allowed.
Texts.CimriInvalidBaseUrl: Cimri BaseUrl in configuration is invalid.
Texts.CimriProductUrlHostNotAllowed: That URL host is not allowed. Use the same host as Cimri:BaseUrl.
Texts.CimriInvalidListingUrl: The listing URL is invalid or not HTTPS.
Texts.CimriListingUrlHostNotAllowed: The listing URL host must match Cimri:BaseUrl or Cimri:AllowedCimriHostSuffix in configuration.
Texts.CimriListingUrlNotConfigured: No listing URL is configured. Set Cimri:ListingPageUrl, or both Cimri:BaseUrl and Cimri:DiscountedListingPath in appsettings/environment, or pass listingPageUrl in the API request.
Texts.CimriBaseUrlOrHostSuffixRequired: Either Cimri:BaseUrl or Cimri:AllowedCimriHostSuffix must be set for product URL host validation.
Texts.CimriListingPagePlaceholder: Full HTTPS listing URL (you choose the page)
Texts.CimriSyncQueuedInfo: Job queued; the progress bar below shows live status.
Texts.CimriInvalidMaxProducts: MaxProducts must be at least 1 when set.
Texts.CimriProductDetailFetchFailed: Could not fetch the Cimri product detail page.
